summary: Stores and emits a floating-point control payload.
description: Use Float when a patch needs a generic numeric control payload. Representation such as f32 or f8 is selected separately from the control.number.float port type.
runtimeBehavior: in is the hot control.message.any inlet: typed payloads update and emit, bang emits the stored payload, and set ... updates silently. cold updates silently.

ports.description: Hot inlet: typed payloads update and emit; bang emits the stored payload; set ... updates silently.
Cold inlet: compatible payloads update the stored payload without emitting.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.
Optional display widget. Use slider for a compact runtime slider object.
Numeric storage/transport representation such as f32, f16, or f8.e4m3.

example.title: Drive a shader uniform
example.description: Connect value to a fullscreen shader numeric input, then send runtime in/set/bang events while the preview runs.
